open.no_config: An administrator must first configure the bot using `/setup`.
open.no_packs: You have no packs available. Next ones arrive {{time}}.
open.no_members: There are no eligible members to draw from.

inventory.empty: Your inventory is empty. Open a pack with `/open`!
inventory.title: Inventory — {{username}}

sell.not_found: Card #{{id}} was not found in your inventory.
sell.listed: This card is listed on the market. Remove it first with `/market cancel`.

trade.self_or_bot: You cannot trade with yourself or bots.
trade.unavailable: One of the cards is no longer available. Trade cancelled.

market.list_not_found: Card not found in your inventory.
market.list_already: This card is already listed on the market.
market.buy_not_found: This offer does not exist or has already been sold.
market.buy_own: You cannot buy your own listing.
market.view_empty: There are no listings on the market.
market.cancel_not_found: No listing with that ID was found for you.

cards.not_found: No card with that ID was found on this server.
cards.user_error: Could not fetch user data for this card.

setup.success:
Configuration saved!
📍 Channel: {{channel}}
⏰ Interval: **{{interval}}h**
📦 Packs per cycle: **{{packs}}**

errors.generic: An error occurred while executing this command.
